//: Intentionally empty for the monorepo-wide `pnpm typecheck` (which runs `tsc --noEmit` per workspace). Nuxt's real type story relies on `.nuxt/tsconfig.json`, which is generated by `nuxt prepare` and references the module-augmentation types for `nuxt.config.ts`'s `hover` key etc. To typecheck the Nuxt app properly, run `pnpm --filter nuxt-app exec nuxt typecheck` (requires installing `vue-tsc` and `typescript` per Nuxt docs).
